name: Writesonic
data_egress_concerns: SEO keyword strategies and content calendars pasted into the tool reveal competitive positioning
Blog and article drafts containing internal data, customer references, or financial projections
Product landing page copy that reveals unreleased features or pricing strategies
Brand voice training data uploaded to customize outputs may contain proprietary guidelines
training_use_default: Enterprise plan data is excluded from model training per vendor documentation. Free and lower tiers should be assumed to contribute data for service improvement unless confirmed otherwise.
